verses.text: A khangham bel keimah Johan in Lungsim takpi tawh ka hong it ka lawm Gaias tungah lai ka hong khak hi
Ka lawm it Gaias aw, nang na ci damin na vai khempeuh zong na ma pai ding hi, ci-in ka lamen hi. Kha thu tawh kisai lamsangah zong bangmah lungkhamna omlo ding hi, ci-in ka thei hi
Nang a mantakin a gamta na hih takpi mah bangin, i Khristian mipih hih lai-a hong pai peuhpeuh in a mantakin na nuntakna thu hong gen uh ahih manin ka nuam mahmah hi
Tate bangin ka hong neih mite a mantakin a gamtatna uh ka zakna hangin ka lungdamna sangin adang lungdamna lianzaw bangmah omlo hi.
Ka hong it lawm Gaias aw, na theih ngeiloh hinapi-in i Khristian mipihte lungsim takpi tawh na na huh hi
Amaute na limbawlna thu, hih lai-a pawlpite kiangah hong gen uh hi. I biak Pasian' deihna tawh kituakin a khualzinna uh nuamtakin a zoptheihna dingun na huh in
Amaute pen Pasian' nasem dingin a khualzin khia uh hi a, thu umlo mite tung panin bangmah huhna ngahlo uh hi
Tua ahih manin Pasian thuman nasepna-ah nasem khawm mite ihih theihna dingin ei Khristian-te in hihbang mite i huh ding ahi hi.
Na pawlpite kiangah lai ka gelh ngei hi. Ahi zongin na pawlpi sungah milian pen a ut Diotrefes in ka thugen hong mang nuamlo hi

Tua ahih manin kong pai ciangin kote hong gensiatna, zuauthu a genna, leh a gamtatna khempeuh ka pholak ding hi. Tua bang mi gensiatna ciang bek hiloin, i Khristian mipihte zin nangawn tungsak nuamlo a, zin a tungsak nuamte nangawn khamin, pawlpi panin hawlkhiat ding hanciam lai hi.
Ka hong it lawm Gaias aw, mi hoihlote' gamtatna zui kei in la, mihoihte' gamtatna zui in. A gamtat hoih mite pen Pasian tawh a kipawl mi hi a, a gamtat hoihlo mite pen Pasian a thei nailo ahi uh hi
Mi khempeuh in Demetrias phatkim uh a, a manin ama gamtatna mahmah in hih thu a manna hong kilangsak hi. Kote in zong ama hoihna ka thei uh a, tua ama hoihna ka gennate uh a thuman ahi hi.
Gen ding tampi ka neih hangin lai-in gelhkhiat ding kong sawm kei zaw hi
Nang tawh kimu baih thei dingin kilamen ka hih manin, tuahun ciangin maitang kimu-in i kiho ding hi
Nangma tungah nopsakna thupha hong tung ta hen. Hih lai-a om i lawmte in hong hopih uh hi. Tua lai-a om i lawmte khempeuh a milipin na hopihsak in.
